name: BLACKBERRY Ltd
summary: PART I The Company: A heritage of innovation Founded in 1984, the Company is a leading provider of intelligent software and services to enterprises, governments and leading OEMs around the world. Its products enable more than 255 million vehicles and secure 17 of the G20 governments. Based in Waterloo, Ontario, the Company has two core divisions, each addressing large and growing market opportunities.
